title: Dischidia mariae

This plant belongs to the genus Dischidia, which comprises around 50 species of epiphytic or climbing plants native to tropical Asia. Dischidia mariae is further classified as Dischidia mariae H.St John, which indicates its specific binomial nomenclature. intro: Dischidia mariae, also known as Mary's lace or Dischidia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
